title: WSET Knowledge Map — Topic
description: A curriculum-level grouping of related WSET L3 knowledge. Topics are the primary navigation layer of the knowledge map.

topic_id.description: Stable unique identifier. Format: T_{RA}_{SLUG} — e.g. T_RA1_MALOLACTIC_CONVERSION

topic_name.description: Human-readable topic name as it appears in WSET curriculum.

ra.description: WSET Learning Area this topic belongs to.

parent_topic.description: topic_id of the parent topic, if this is a subtopic. Null for top-level topics.

child_topics.description: List of topic_ids that are subtopics of this topic.

related_topics.description: topic_ids that are semantically related but not parent/child.

prerequisite_topics.description: topic_ids that a learner should master before this topic. Used for adaptive sequencing.

difficulty.description: Estimated difficulty level for WSET L3 learners.

official_sources.description: References to official WSET sources covering this topic.

reference.description: Chapter, section, or page reference within the official source.

pedagogical_sources.description: Non-official pedagogical sources that cover this topic. For Tutor Agent only.

reference.description: Identifier or description of the specific pedagogical resource.

tags.description: Free-form tags for search and filtering.

_meta.description: Metadata for version control and human review tracking.
